description: One Wallet + One Subscription (Quant Pro) - Extend packages/payments/ with: unified wallet visible in AppShell user menu (add-money via Stripe/Razorpay/UPI, spend: tips/boosts/AI/courses, cashout via Stripe Connect + Razorpay Payouts), GST/VAT/sales-tax handling, and Quant Pro single subscription across all apps with Stripe Subscription + Apple/Google IAP server-side receipt validation.
steps: 1. Update packages/payments/src/types.ts: Add types - RazorpayPayment, UPIPayment, AddMoneySource ('stripe' | 'razorpay' | 'upi'), SpendCategory ('tip' | 'boost_ad' | 'ai_usage' | 'course_unlock' | 'premium_content'), QuantProPlan (free, pro_monthly, pro_yearly), IAPReceipt (platform: 'apple' | 'google', receiptData, transactionId, productId), IAPValidationResult, TaxBreakdown (subtotal, taxType, taxRate, taxAmount, total), IndianTaxInfo (gstin, state, hsnCode).

2. Create packages/payments/src/services/razorpay-gateway.service.ts: Implement RazorpayGateway with: createOrder(amount, currency), verifyPayment(orderId, paymentId, signature), createPayout(accountId, amount), getPaymentStatus(paymentId). Uses razorpay npm package types but works with in-memory simulation for testing.

3. Create packages/payments/src/services/upi-payment.service.ts: Implement UPIPaymentService with: generatePaymentLink(amount, upiId), verifyPayment(transactionRef), getPaymentStatus(ref). Simulated for testing.

4. Create packages/payments/src/services/unified-wallet.service.ts: Implement UnifiedWalletService extending WalletService with: addMoney(userId, amount, source: AddMoneySource, paymentRef), spend(userId, amount, category: SpendCategory, targetId), getWalletSummary(userId) returning balance + recent transactions + pending cashouts. This is the single wallet visible in AppShell.

5. Create packages/payments/src/services/quant-pro.service.ts: Implement QuantProService with: subscribe(userId, plan: QuantProPlan, paymentMethod), cancelSubscription(userId), getSubscriptionStatus(userId), isProFeatureEnabled(userId, feature), validateIAPReceipt(receipt: IAPReceipt) -> IAPValidationResult (server-side Apple/Google validation logic), syncIAPSubscription(userId, receipt). Register Quant Pro plans (free, pro_monthly at $9.99, pro_yearly at $99.99).

6. Update packages/payments/src/services/tax-service.ts: Extend with: calculateGST(amount, state, hsnCode), calculateVAT(amount, countryCode), calculateSalesTax(amount, state, zipCode), getFullTaxBreakdown(amount, userLocation, productType) -> TaxBreakdown. Add Indian GST slabs (0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28%), EU VAT rates by country, US state sales tax.
7. Update packages/payments/src/index.ts: Export all new services - RazorpayGateway, UPIPaymentService, UnifiedWalletService, QuantProService, and extended types.
8. Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/razorpay-gateway.service.test.ts: Test order creation, payment verification, payout creation.
9. Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/upi-payment.service.test.ts: Test payment link generation, verification.
10. Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/unified-wallet.service.test.ts: Test add money from different sources, spend across categories, wallet summary.
11. Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/quant-pro.service.test.ts: Test subscription lifecycle, IAP receipt validation (Apple + Google), feature gating based on plan.
12. Create packages/payments/src/services/__tests__/tax-service-extended.test.ts: Test GST calculation for different slabs, VAT for EU countries, US sales tax.
acceptance_criteria: UnifiedWalletService provides add-money via Stripe, Razorpay, and UPI sources
Spend categories cover tip, boost_ad, ai_usage, course_unlock, premium_content
RazorpayGateway supports order creation and payout (India market)
UPIPaymentService generates payment links and verifies transactions
QuantProService manages a single subscription across all apps with free/pro_monthly/pro_yearly tiers
IAP receipt validation works for both Apple and Google platforms
TaxService handles GST (India), VAT (EU), and sales tax (US) calculations
Cashout works via both Stripe Connect and Razorpay Payouts
